message:
feat(websocket): add WebSocket client with Cx integration (bd-rww6)

Implement WebSocket client for cancel-correct communication:
- Message type: Text, Binary, Ping, Pong, Close
- WebSocketConfig: max frame/message size, ping interval, protocols
- WebSocket::connect() for TCP connections (ws://)
- send()/recv() methods with Cx cancellation checks
- Automatic ping/pong handling
- Clean close handshake on cancellation (GoingAway 1001)
- Export types from net::websocket and net modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
